---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new source, a new command, a UI detail
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Purpose

What do you want to achieve? Which workflow is awkward or impossible today?

## Proposal

What could it look like — CLI command, new API, UI element?
If a source/adapter: which one?
If UI: a quick mockup hint is enough.

## Alternatives

Other tools/workflows you looked at that already do this, or that you
ruled out?

## Willing to help?

- [ ] I can open a PR myself
- [ ] I can test if someone else implements
- [ ] Input only, no code from me
